name: My employer says no respirators needed, but I'm wheezing— who's right?

mainEntity.name: My employer says no respirators needed, but I'm wheezing— who's right?

acceptedAnswer.text: OSHA mandates hazard eval—employer likely wrong[1].
acceptedAnswer.description: OSHA requires evaluation for potential overexposure even below PELs; employer must assess hazards under 1910.134[1][7]. File OSHA complaint anonymously. - Request written program if required. - Your health symptoms trigger duty. Report to OSHA, demand testing, protect your claim.

description: OSHA mandates hazard eval—employer likely wrong[1].
